summary: Comprehensive testing of Music Bingo app completed successfully. All backend APIs (21/21 tests passed - 100%) and frontend features are working correctly. SharePoint integration is live and returning 76 songs for 1980s decade. Both Music Bingo and Traditional Bingo modes fully functional including wizard flows, timer intervals, and host dashboards.
passed_tests: Lobby page renders with Quick Play and Custom Setup cards
Custom Setup wizard for Music Bingo: 5-step flow (Bingo Type -> Music Decade -> Game Speed -> Round Type -> Interval)
Custom Setup wizard for Traditional Bingo: 4-step flow (Bingo Type -> Game Type -> Round Type -> Interval)
Timer intervals change based on game type: Lightning shows 10/15 sec, Regular shows 30/45/60 sec
Default call_interval is 30 seconds for both modes
POST /api/game/create - creates game with correct settings for both bingo types
GET /api/songlist/1980s - returns 76 songs from SharePoint (source: sharepoint)
GET /api/sharepoint/test - returns success with site_id and drive_id
GET /api/game/state - returns current game state correctly
POST /api/game/start - starts game successfully
POST /api/game/call-number - calls bingo numbers correctly (Traditional)
POST /api/game/call-song - calls songs correctly (Music Bingo)
POST /api/game/pause - pauses game
POST /api/game/resume - resumes game
POST /api/game/bingo - claims bingo and pauses for verification
POST /api/game/verify-bingo - confirms or rejects bingo correctly
POST /api/game/end-round - ends round
POST /api/game/new-round - starts new round with reset state
Host Dashboard renders correctly for Music Bingo mode with video player on left, controls on right
Host Dashboard renders correctly for Traditional Bingo mode with bingo board
Audience View page renders at /audience route
Audience View shows game state with round info and number/song display
Back button on Host Dashboard navigates to lobby
BroadcastChannel API setup in HostDashboard and AudienceView for video mirroring
seed_data_creation: None needed - SharePoint integration provides real song data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Key test file at /app/backend/tests/test_music_bingo.py covers all API endpoints. SharePoint is returning real song data (76 songs for 1980s). BroadcastChannel video mirroring only works when Host and Audience are in same browser. Timer intervals correctly switch between 10/15s (Lightning) and 30/45/60s (Regular).

audience_view.traditional: Shows current number with BINGO letters
audience_view.music: Mirrors video via BroadcastChannel + shows song info
